raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXXThis matter concerns an online order I did not receive and Macy\'s failure to process a credit to my store card.XX/XX/XXXXplaced the online order at XX/XX/XXXX onXX/XX/XXXX (XX/XX/XXXX) for XX/XX/XXXX identical coats inXX/XX/XXXX sizes.  They cost XX/XX/XXXX each and were sent via XX/XX/XXXX in XX/XX/XXXX shipments to my husband\'s office address.XX/XX/XXXXOnlyXX/XX/XXXXof the XX/XX/XXXXcoats was received (on or around XX/XX/XXXX) and I returned it in-person to Macys at XX/XX/XXXXChicago on XX/XX/XXXXThe XX/XX/XXXX coat was not received. I contactedXX/XX/XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX to track the shipment.  XX/XX/XXXX investigated, stated the package was delivered to the wrong address, and they could not retrieve it. XX/XX/XXXXstated it would contact Macys about this matter and advised me to contact Macy\'s for a refund.XX/XX/XXXXI spoke with a Macy\'s customer service on XX/XX/XXXX and submitted an online credit card dispute.  I received a letter from Macys Credit Customer Service Team dated XX/XX/XXXX acknowledging the disputed transaction inquiry.  I received aXX/XX/XXXXletter dated XX/XX/XXXX stating the dispute was resolved in my favor, and that an adjustment should appear on my statement within XX/XX/XXXX billing cyclesXX/XX/XXXXI contacted Macys customer service multiple times between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXXfor an explanation as to why my credit card had not been credited.  These interactions were documented by Macys customer service representatives.  I was told the order department saw theXX/XX/XXXX credit from the coat I received and returned and closed out the dispute for the coat I did not receive.  And that nothing could be doneXX/XX/XXXXOn XX/XX/XXXX a claim was reopened (Case IDXX/XX/XXXX).  On XX/XX/XXXX, a dispute department investigator told me that the matter had been resolved in my favor and it would take the order department XX/XX/XXXX business days to process the credit.XX/XX/XXXXOn XX/XX/XXXX, I received an email from XX/XX/XXXXMacys Customer Care Specialist stating that the refund request could not be processed because Macy\'s was not notified within XX/XX/XXXX days delivery that the order was not received. I called Macy\'s customer service on XX/XX/XXXX and spoke with an order department supervisor (XX/XX/XXXX), who stated the dispute department\'s resolution was denied because the claim was initiated more than XX/XX/XXXX days after the incident.  "XX/XX/XXXX" stated nothing more could be done.'
